name: orchestrate-skill
description: Select and run bounded multi-agent strategies with durable artifacts, explicit models, typed review gates, and safe recovery.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent strategy selection, dispatch, and gates
interface.longDescription: Choose and execute staged, parallel, hierarchical, team, workflow, loop, advisor, adversarial, or external-CLI agent strategies with durable state and review gates.
defaultPrompt: Use $orchestrate to execute this implementation plan.
Use $orchestrate to fan these independent tasks out safely.
